title: InuYasha
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across the original 2000-2004 anime (167 eps, manga vols 1-36 with interleaved filler) + The Final Act (26 eps, vols 34-56). Manga complete at 558 chapters. The original series's arc boundaries are loose because of interleaved filler; ranges below approximate the dominant manga material per anime block. The Final Act is a faithful, filler-free adaptation of the closing arcs.
